# Archeritage

- Build a premium architecture and cabinet website in Next.js App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.
- Favor reusable components, strong typing, semantic markup, responsive layouts, and accessible interactions.
- Use GSAP, @gsap/react, ScrollTrigger, and Lenis only in client components with proper cleanup and reduced-motion support.
- Keep data in `src/data` and reuse it across navigation, services, projects, posts, stats, process, and footer.
- Use placeholder paths under `/public/images/...` and safe fallbacks when assets are missing.
